entities.name: GENOME ANNOTATION
entities.description: The process of identifying the locations of genes and coding regions in a genome.

entities.name: GENE MODEL
entities.description: A representation of the structure of a gene, including exons and introns.

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC AND COMPARATIVE STUDIES
entities.description: Research methods used to analyze evolutionary relationships among biological entities.

entities.name: EVOLUTIONARY CONSERVATION-BASED GENE MODEL PREDICTION
entities.description: A proposed method to support gene model prediction and identify erroneous annotations based on evolutionary conservation.

entities.name: EVOLUTIONARY CONSERVATION
entities.description: The preservation of nucleotide sequences or protein structures across different species over time.

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: A family of plants used as a source of food and fodder.

entities.name: LEGUME ASSEMBLIES
entities.description: The reconstructed genomic sequences of various legume species.
